mapper.select: SELECT '100' AS GATE_CD , HD.CM_REQ_ID , HD.REG_USER_ID AS REG_USER_ID FROM TBT_CM_REQ_INFO HD WHERE 1 = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT COMPANY_CD FROM STOHCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND USER_ID = HD.REG_USER_ID AND USE_FLAG = '1') AND (PR_COMP_FLAG,'0') = '0' AND HD.IF_TYPE IS NOT NULL
SELECT A.COMPANY_CD , A.USER_ID FROM STOHCVUR A WHERE A.GATE_CD = '100' AND A.USER_ID = #{REG_USER_ID} AND A.USE_FLAG = '1'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCCVUR ( GATE_CD , USER_ID , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , COMPANY_CD , MNG_YN , USER_TYPE , WORK_TYPE , USER_NM , PASSWORD , EMPLOYEE_NO , DEPT_CD , DEPT_NM , POSITION_NM , TEL_NUM , FAX_NUM , CELL_NUM , EMAIL , ZIP_CD , ADDR_1 , ADDR_2 , SMS_FLAG , MAIL_FLAG , BLOCK_FLAG , BLOCK_REASON , PW_WRONG_CNT , PW_RESET_FLAG , PW_RESET_DATE , LAST_LOGIN_DATE , IP_ADDR , USE_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , CONFIRM_USER_ID , CONFIRM_DATE , DATA_CREATION_TYPE , ERP_IF_ID , ERP_IF_SEND_FLAG , VNGL_ROLE , AGREE_ATT_FILE_NUM , AGREE_YN , AGREE_YN_DATE , DUTY_NM , CHIEF_USER_ID , ROLE_TEXT , ROLE_TEXT_DETAIL , ONES_DUTY_NM , PARENT_DEPT_CD , PARENT_DEPT_NM , EMPLOYEE_NUM , BLOCK_DATE , SITE_USER_ID , GENDER , BIRTH_DATE ) SELECT GATE_CD , USER_ID , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , COMPANY_CD , MNG_YN , USER_TYPE , WORK_TYPE , USER_NM , PASSWORD , EMPLOYEE_NO , DEPT_CD , DEPT_NM , POSITION_NM , TEL_NUM , FAX_NUM , CELL_NUM , EMAIL , ZIP_CD , ADDR_1 , ADDR_2 , SMS_FLAG , MAIL_FLAG , BLOCK_FLAG , BLOCK_REASON , PW_WRONG_CNT , PW_RESET_FLAG , PW_RESET_DATE , SYSDATE , IP_ADDR , USE_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , CONFIRM_USER_ID , CONFIRM_DATE , DATA_CREATION_TYPE , ERP_IF_ID , ERP_IF_SEND_FLAG , VNGL_ROLE , AGREE_ATT_FILE_NUM , AGREE_YN , AGREE_YN_DATE , DUTY_NM , CHIEF_USER_ID , ROLE_TEXT , ROLE_TEXT_DETAIL , ONES_DUTY_NM , PARENT_DEPT_CD , PARENT_DEPT_NM , EMPLOYEE_NUM , BLOCK_DATE , SITE_USER_ID , GENDER , BIRTH_DATE FROM STOHCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND USER_ID = #{REG_USER_ID}
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCUSAP SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE -- MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID = #{REG_USER_ID} -- MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG = '0' -- DEL_FLAG WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND USER_ID = #{REG_USER_ID}
UPDATE STOCBACP SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE -- MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID = #{REG_USER_ID} -- MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG = '0' -- DEL_FLAG WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND CTRL_USER_ID = #{REG_USER_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT '100' AS GATE_CD , HD.CM_REQ_ID , HD.CM_REQ_ID AS PR_NUM -- IT Portal CM_REQ_ID 로 넣어도 되는지 검토 , (SELECT COMPANY_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND USER_ID = HD.REG_USER_ID AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USE_FLAG = '1' ) AS BUYER_CD , HD.REG_STIME AS REG_DATE --날짜변환 , HD.REG_USER_ID AS REG_USER_ID , NULL AS MOD_DATE , NULL AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , HD.CM_REQ_NM AS SUBJECT , SUBSTR(HD.REG_STIME, 1, 8) AS REQ_DATE --계약의뢰일자는 등록일로 사용 , HD.REQ_DEPT_ID AS DEPT_CD , HD.REQ_USER_ID AS REQ_USER_ID , NULL AS PR_TYPE , NULL AS PR_AMT --PRDT 금액 SUM , 'KRW' AS CUR , NULL AS ATT_FILE_NUM , NULL AS APP_DOC_NUM , NULL AS APP_DOC_CNT , 'E' AS SIGN_STATUS , NULL AS SIGN_DATE , NULL AS RMK_TEXT_NUM , NULL AS ITEM_RMK , NULL AS DIRECT_DATE , HD.CM_REQ_ID AS CM_REQ_ID , NULL AS PROJECT_CD , NULL AS PROJECT_SQ , NULL AS PROJECT_TYPE , HD.IF_TYPE AS IF_TYPE , HD.MNT_YN AS MNT_YN FROM TBT_CM_REQ_INFO HD WHERE 1 = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT COMPANY_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND USER_ID = HD.REG_USER_ID AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USE_FLAG = '1') AND (PR_COMP_FLAG,'0') = '0' AND HD.IF_TYPE IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCPRHD ( GATE_CD , PR_NUM , BUYER_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , SUBJECT , REQ_DATE , DEPT_CD , REQ_USER_ID , PR_TYPE , PR_AMT , CUR , ATT_FILE_NUM , APP_DOC_NUM , APP_DOC_CNT , SIGN_STATUS , SIGN_DATE , RMK_TEXT_NUM , ITEM_RMK , DIRECT_DATE , CM_REQ_ID , PROJECT_CD , PROJECT_SQ , PROJECT_TYPE , IF_TYPE , MNT_YN ) SELECT '100' AS GATE_CD , #{PR_NUM} AS PR_NUM , #{BUYER_CD} AS BUYER_CD , TO_DATE(HD.REG_STIME,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REG_DATE , HD.REG_USER_ID AS REG_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , HD.CM_REQ_NM AS SUBJECT , SUBSTR(HD.REG_STIME, 1, 8) AS REQ_DATE , HD.REQ_DEPT_ID AS DEPT_CD ,(HD.REQ_USER_ID, HD.REG_USER_ID) AS REQ_USER_ID -- 요청자가 없는 경우 등록자를 요청자로 함 ,(CASE WHEN TRIM(HD.MNT_TYPE) = '변경' THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX(PRE_CONT_NUM) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_M WHERE CM_REQ_ID = HD.CM_REQ_ID) IS NULL THEN '10' ELSE '20' END) WHEN TRIM(HD.MNT_TYPE) = '자동연장' THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX(PRE_CONT_NUM) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_DET_M WHERE CM_REQ_ID = HD.CM_REQ_ID) IS NULL THEN '10' ELSE '30' END) ELSE '10' END) AS PR_TYPE -- M134 ,(SELECT SUM(PR_AMT) FROM STOCPRDT WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND PR_NUM = HD.CM_REQ_ID) AS PR_AMT --PRDT 금액 SUM , 'KRW' AS CUR , NULL AS ATT_FILE_NUM , NULL AS APP_DOC_NUM , NULL AS APP_DOC_CNT , 'E' AS SIGN_STATUS , NULL AS SIGN_DATE , NULL AS RMK_TEXT_NUM , NULL AS ITEM_RMK , NULL AS DIRECT_DATE , HD.CM_REQ_ID , NULL AS PROJECT_CD , NULL AS PROJECT_SQ , NULL AS PROJECT_TYPE , HD.IF_TYPE , HD.MNT_YN FROM TBT_CM_REQ_INFO HD WHERE HD.CM_REQ_ID = #{CM_REQ_ID}

INSERT INTO STOCPRDT ( GATE_CD ,PR_NUM ,PR_SQ ,BUYER_CD ,REG_DATE ,REG_USER_ID ,MOD_DATE ,MOD_USER_ID ,DEL_FLAG ,PROGRESS_CD ,ITEM_CD ,ITEM_DESC ,ITEM_SPEC ,MAKER_CD ,MAKER_PART_NO ,ORIGIN_CD ,PR_QT ,UNIT_CD ,UNIT_PRC ,PR_AMT ,DUE_DATE ,DELY_TO_CD ,DELY_TO_NM ,ATT_FILE_NUM ,ITEM_RMK ,VENDOR_CD ,PURCHASE_TYPE ,VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE ,SUBMIT_TYPE ,AMT_TYPE ,CTRL_CD ,CTRL_USER_ID ,RECEIPT_DATE ,REJECT_RMK ,REJECT_DATE ,PO_REQ_DATE ,CN_DATE ,RECEIPT_FLAG ,LAST_VENDOR_CD ,LAST_UNIT_PRC ,LAST_ITEM_AMT ,LAST_PO_NUM ,LAST_PO_SQ ,LAST_PO_FLAG ,LAST_PO_CUR ,MNT_SANGJU_YN ,CONSUMER_AMT ,FC_MNT_TERM ,CH_RATE ,DOIB_AMT ,MNT_RATE ,MNT_SDAY ,MNT_EDAY ,MNT_GUR_MONTH ,RT_INSP_PERIOD ,FALT_RC_TG_TIME ,CM_REQ_ID ,CM_REQ_DET_ID ,MULPUM_ID ,PR_DEPT_CD ,EC_BUYER_CD ,EC_DEPT_CD ,CM_TYPE ,CM_REQ_DET_NM ,BZ_TIMELINE_SDAY ,BZ_TIMELINE_EDAY ,ACC_CD ,ACC_HNG_NM ,ACC_MOK_NM ,ACC_DET_NM ,BDGT_INFO ,MNT_AMT ,PAY_PERIOD_MTHD ,PAY_PERIOD_MTHD2 ,GISANIL ,PROJECT_CD ,PROJECT_SQ ,PROJECT_TYPE ,CONT_GROUND ,CONT_RMK ,VAT_TYPE ,PR_BUYER_CD ,PRE_BUYER_CD ,PRE_CONT_NUM ,PRE_CONT_CNT ) SELECT '100' AS GATE_CD , #{PR_NUM} AS PR_NUM , ROWNUM AS PR_SQ --CM_REQ_ID에 대한 TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_SPEC 의 ROW 차수 1,2,3,4.... , #{BUYER_CD} AS BUYER_CD -- HD.BUYER_CD ,(CASE WHEN HD.MNT_YN = 'Y' THEN TO_DATE(DM1.REG_STIME,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHEN HD.MNT_YN IN ('O','Z') THEN TO_DATE(DM1.REG_STIME,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ELSE TO_DATE(DT.REG_STIME,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') END) AS REG_DATE --HD.REG_DATE ,(CASE WHEN HD.MNT_YN = 'Y' THEN DM1.REG_USER_ID WHEN HD.MNT_YN IN ('O','Z') THEN DM1.REG_USER_ID ELSE DT.REG_USER_ID END) AS REG_USER_ID --HD.REG_USER_ID , NULL AS MOD_DATE , NULL AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , '2100' AS PROGRESS_CD --구매의뢰 접수대기 ,(CASE WHEN DT.CLS_GRADE IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DT.CLS_GRADE END) AS ITEM_CD ,(CASE WHEN HD.MNT_YN = 'Y' THEN DM1.CM_REQ_DET_NM WHEN HD.MNT_YN IN ('O','Z') THEN DM1.CM_REQ_DET_NM ELSE DT.MULPUM_NM END) AS ITEM_DESC , NULL AS ITEM_SPEC , DT.MAF_COMP AS MAKER_CD --제조사명으로 넘어옴 어떻게? 답이없음. , NULL AS MAKER_PART_NO , NULL AS ORIGIN_CD ,(CASE WHEN HD.MNT_YN = 'Y' THEN '1' WHEN HD.MNT_YN IN ('O','Z') THEN '1' ELSE (DT.AM_CNT, 1) END) AS PR_QT , DT.AM_CNT_DANWI AS UNIT_CD --단위는 어떻게 통일? ,(CASE WHEN HD.MNT_YN = 'Y' THEN DM1.DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT WHEN HD.MNT_YN IN ('O','Z') THEN DM1.DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ELSE ROUND( DT.ESTIMATE_AMOUNT / (DECODE(DT.AM_CNT, 0, NULL, DT.AM_CNT), 1) ) END) AS UNIT_PRC ,(CASE WHEN HD.MNT_YN = 'Y' THEN DM1.DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT WHEN HD.MNT_YN IN ('O','Z') THEN DM1.DET_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT ELSE DT.ESTIMATE_AMOUNT END) AS PR_AMT , NULL AS DUE_DATE , NULL AS DELY_TO_CD , NULL AS DELY_TO_NM , NULL AS ATT_FILE_NUM , NULL AS ITEM_RMK , NULL AS VENDOR_CD -- 업체정보 어떻게?, DM1.OM_COMP_NM 업체명 존재 사업자번호? 업체명으로 데이터가 들어가 있음. ,(CASE WHEN HD.MNT_YN = 'Y' THEN ((SELECT CODE FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND CODE_TYPE = 'M061' AND TEXT1 = DM1.CM_CLASS_NM AND ROWNUM = 1), 'E') -- 유지보수 ELSE ((SELECT CODE FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND CODE_TYPE = 'M061' AND TEXT1 = DM1.CM_CLASS_NM AND ROWNUM = 1), 'E') END) AS PURCHASE_TYPE ,(SELECT CODE FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD='100' AND CODE_TYPE='M301' AND TEXT1= DM1.CM_TYPE AND ROWNUM = 1) AS VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE --코드변환 - CM001_01_00 , NULL AS SUBMIT_TYPE , NULL AS AMT_TYPE , NULL AS CTRL_CD , NULL AS CTRL_USER_ID --직무코드랑 직무담당자가 언제 들어가지? 담당자 지정 화면에서 들어감 , NULL AS RECEIPT_DATE , NULL AS REJECT_RMK , NULL AS REJECT_DATE , NULL AS PO_REQ_DATE , NULL AS CN_DATE , '0' AS RECEIPT_FLAG --미접수 , NULL AS LAST_VENDOR_CD , NULL AS LAST_UNIT_PRC , NULL AS LAST_ITEM_AMT , NULL AS LAST_PO_NUM , NULL AS LAST_PO_SQ , NULL AS LAST_PO_FLAG , NULL AS LAST_PO_CUR , DM1.MNT_SANGJU_YN AS MNT_SANGJU_YN , DT.CONSUME_AMOUNT AS CONSUMER_AMT , NULL AS FC_MNT_TERM --무상유지보수기간 : 유지보수보장개월수? , NULL AS CH_RATE --유상요율 ,(DM1.DOIB_AMOUNT, DM2.DOIB_AMOUNT) AS DOIB_AMT , DM2.YOYUL AS MNT_RATE , NULL AS MNT_SDAY , NULL AS MNT_EDAY ,(DM1.MNT_GUR_MONTH, DM2.MNT_GUR_MONTH) AS MNT_GUR_MONTH -- 유지보수 개월수 , NULL AS RT_INSP_PERIOD , NULL AS FALT_RC_TG_TIME , HD.CM_REQ_ID ,(CASE WHEN HD.MNT_YN = 'Y' THEN DM1.CM_REQ_DET_ID WHEN HD.MNT_YN IN ('O','Z') THEN DM1.CM_REQ_DET_ID ELSE DT.CM_REQ_DET_ID END) AS CM_REQ_DET_ID , DT.MULPUM_ID AS MULPUM_ID ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND USER_ID = (HD.REQ_USER_ID, HD.REG_USER_ID) AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USE_FLAG = '1') AS PR_DEPT_CD --TBT_CM_REQ_INFO.REQ_USER_ID의 부서/사무소(요청자가 없는 경우 등록자를 요청자로 함) ,(SELECT CUST_CD FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND IRS_NUM = (CASE WHEN DM1.CM_TR_CORP = '은행' THEN '1028506404' ELSE '2148206195' END) AND ROWNUM = 1) AS EC_BUYER_CD --명으로 넘어옴, 은행, 중앙회 : 하드코딩해서 넣을 것 ,(CASE WHEN DM1.CM_TR_CORP = '은행' THEN '64763' ELSE '00456' END) AS EC_DEPT_CD --EC_BUYER_CD, EC_DEPT_CD 하드코딩할 것 (프로퍼티 처리) 중앙회 IT통합구매팀 2148206195 00456 : 현재기준 : C00009, 00456 은행 IT총무팀 1028506404 64763 : 현재기준 : C00013, 64763 , DM1.CM_TYPE AS CM_TYPE , DM1.CM_REQ_DET_NM AS CM_REQ_DET_NM , DM1.BZ_TIMELINE_SDAY AS BZ_TIMELINE_SDAY , DM1.BZ_TIMELINE_EDAY AS BZ_TIMELINE_EDAY , DT.ACC_CD AS ACC_CD , DT.ACC_HNG_NM AS ACC_HNG_NM , DT.ACC_MOK_NM AS ACC_MOK_NM , DT.ACC_DET_NM AS ACC_DET_NM ,(SELECT LISTAGG('['||BZ_PART_NM||']'||BDGT_BUSEO_NM||'('||REPLACE(TO_CHAR(BDGT_AMOUNT,'999,999,999,999,999'),' ','')||')',',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY BDGT_BUSEO_NM) FROM TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_BDGT WHERE DEL_FLAG = 'N' AND MULPUM_ID = DT.MULPUM_ID) AS BDGT_INFO -- * TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_BDGT 에서 복수개 데이터 구성 , DM2.MNT_AMOUNT AS MNT_AMT ,(CASE WHEN DM1.PAY_PERIOD_MTHD='CM00000383' THEN '1개월' WHEN DM1.PAY_PERIOD_MTHD='CM00000384' THEN '2개월' WHEN DM1.PAY_PERIOD_MTHD='CM00000385' THEN '3개월' WHEN DM1.PAY_PERIOD_MTHD='CM00000386' THEN '6개월' WHEN DM1.PAY_PERIOD_MTHD='CM00000387' THEN '9개월' WHEN DM1.PAY_PERIOD_MTHD='CM00000901' THEN '1년' END) AS PAY_PERIOD_MTHD ,(SELECT CODE FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND CODE_TYPE = 'MP090' AND TEXT1 = DM1.PAY_PERIOD_MTHD2 AND ROWNUM = 1) AS PAY_PERIOD_MTHD2 --코드변환 , TO_DATE((DM1.GISANIL,DM2.GISANIL),'YYYYMMDD') AS GISANIL , NULL AS PROJECT_CD , NULL AS PROJECT_SQ , NULL AS PROJECT_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '001' THEN '계약규정 제6조' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '002' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 가목' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '003' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 나목' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '004' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 아목' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '005' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 타목' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '006' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 바목' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '007' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 3호 차목' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '008' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 16호' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '009' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제32조 1호' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '010' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제29조' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '011' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 가목' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '012' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 나목' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '013' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 다목' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '014' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제37조 4호 라목' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '015' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제38조 제1항 제2호' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '016' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제39조 1항' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '017' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제29조' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '018' THEN '계약사무처리준칙 제63조' WHEN DM1.CM_PROVISION = '099' THEN '직접입력' ELSE DM1.CM_PROVISION END) AS CONT_GROUND , DM1.CM_SAYU AS CONT_RMK , NULL AS VAT_TYPE ,(SELECT COMPANY_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND USER_ID = (HD.REQ_USER_ID, HD.REG_USER_ID) AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USE_FLAG = '1') AS PR_BUYER_CD -- TBT_CM_REQ_INFO.REQ_USER_ID의 부서/사무소(요청자가 없는 경우 등록자를 요청자로 함) , DM1.PRE_BUYER_CD , DM1.PRE_CONT_NUM , DM1.PRE_CONT_CNT FROM TBT_CM_REQ_INFO HD -- IT Portal 계약의뢰정보 HD LEFT JOIN TBT_CM_REQ_DET_M DM1 -- IT Portal 계약의뢰 DET - 세부추진내역 ON (HD.CM_REQ_ID = DM1.CM_REQ_ID) LEFT JOIN TBT_CM_REQ_MULPUM_SPEC DT -- IT Portal 계약의뢰 DT - 표준물품명세서 ON (DT.CM_REQ_ID = DM1.CM_REQ_ID AND DT.CM_REQ_DET_ID = DM1.CM_REQ_DET_ID AND DT.DEL_YN = 'N') LEFT JOIN TBT_CM_REQ_DET_STND_MNT DM2 -- IT Portal 계약의뢰 DET - 세부추진내역-표준물품명세서(유지보수용) ON (DM2.CM_REQ_ID= DM1.CM_REQ_ID AND DM2.CM_REQ_DET_ID = DM1.CM_REQ_DET_ID AND DM2.DEL_YN = 'N') WHERE HD.CM_REQ_ID = #{CM_REQ_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT A.PR_NUM ,(SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(PROGRESS_CD) > 2200 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END FROM STOCPRDT WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND PR_NUM = A.PR_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS EDIT_YN FROM STOCPRHD A WHERE A.CM_REQ_ID = #{CM_REQ_ID} AND ROWNUM = 1
